{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
  <DESCRIPTION>Die Cramerischen Herren Erben und Gebr√ºder Philibert, Buchf√ºhrere in Genff, proponiren dem Publico Subscriptions-Weis, eine neue Edition von</DESCRIPTION>
  <BIBL>
    <AUTHOR>M. T.Ciccronis</AUTHOR>
    <TITLE>Operibus</TITLE>,
    <COMMENTATOR>
      <AUTHOR>Josepho dOlivet</AUTHOR>
    </COMMENTATOR>,
    in sch√∂n Pappier mit neuer Schrifft, von St. Augustini Text und Garamondi Noten;
    in conformit√§t der Pariser Edition sehr correct heraus zugeben, und versprechen solches von allen darinn sich befindlichen Fehleren zu reinigen Íùõc.
    <FORMAT>4t√≤</FORMAT>
    <VOLUME>9. Volumina</VOLUME>
    <PRICE>
      <CURRENCY>Franz√∂sische Valuta</CURRENCY>
      <AMOUNT>67 Livres</AMOUNT>
    </PRICE>
    <ALTERNATE_PRICE>
      <CURRENCY>Genffer-Geld</CURRENCY>
      <AMOUNT>40. Francken</AMOUNT>
    </ALTERNATE_PRICE>
  </BIBL>
  <NOTES>das weitere kan aus dem Project und Aviso bey Herrn Onoffrio Hoffmann allhier ersehen werden.</NOTES>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":11,"explanation":"The provided XML had several issues: 
- The tags were not properly closed.
- Some tags like PRICE were used multiple times with different values, so they were split into separate tags (PRICE, ALTERNATE_PRICE).
- Tags like COMMENTATOR were added for better structure.
- DESCRIPTION and NOTES tags were added for clarity."}
